articles.title: Stacks (STX) price rallies 195% after revealing plans to bring DeFi to Bitcoin
articles.description: STX price rallied 195% after the introduction of smart contracts enabled the launch of DeFi and NFTs on the Bitcoin network.

articles.title: Ripple vs. SEC Lawsuit Takes A Surprising Turn As New Bombshell Case Springs Up
articles.description: A recent development in the case of Ripple and the SEC, that saw two independent defendants file a letter to have their connection with the case summarily dismissed, may turn the case in Ripple’s favor. articles.title: US Megabank JPMorgan To Let All Retail Customers Invest In Bitcoin, Ethereum, And Bitcoin Cash Funds
articles.description: Major American investment bank JPMorgan Chase & Co will give its wealth management clients access to a selection of cryptocurrency funds, becoming the largest and unlikeliest United States banking giant to open crypto trading to all clients. articles.title: Upward From Here? Analyst Strongly Insists Bitcoin Has Fully Bottomed Out
articles.description: Over the past weeks, analysts have been dropping hot takes on Bitcoin, and a majority of them have been bullish.
